title: Understanding White Noise: Benefits, Uses & Science
description: Discover how white noise works, its benefits for sleep and focus, and practical tips for use. #WhiteNoise #SleepTips #Focus #Wellness

slides.topSection: Top half: chaotic sounds (car horns, barking dogs, alarms), red X in center, caption: 'DISRUPTIVE SOUND CLUTTER'
slides.bottomSection: Bottom half: smooth sound waves, green check in center, caption: 'CONSISTENT AUDIBLE MASKING'

slides.topSection: Top half: jagged frequency graph with red X, caption: 'IRREGULAR SOUND PATTERNS'
slides.bottomSection: Bottom half: flat frequency line with green check, caption: 'EQUAL ENERGY ACROSS FREQUENCIES'

slides.topSection: Top half: insomnia icon, stress symbol, red X, caption: 'SLEEP INTERRUPTIONS & ANXIETY'
slides.bottomSection: Bottom half: sleeping baby, calm adult, green check, caption: 'DEEP SLEEP & RELAXATION'

slides.topSection: Top half: crying baby, noisy office, red X, caption: 'NOISE-RELATED STRESS'
slides.bottomSection: Bottom half: baby sleeping, focused worker, green check, caption: 'BABIES, STUDYING, FOCUS'

slides.topSection: Top half: confused icons (pink, brown, white noise), red X, caption: 'MISUNDERSTOOD SOUND TYPES'
slides.bottomSection: Bottom half: labeled pink/brown/white noise icons, green check, caption: 'DIFFERENT COLORS FOR DIFFERENT NEEDS'

slides.topSection: Top half: loud speaker, wrong volume icon, red X, caption: 'TOO LOUD OR WRONG USE'
slides.bottomSection: Bottom half: optimal volume slider, consistent timer, green check, caption: 'MODERATE VOLUME & REGULAR USE'
